title: Huawei HSIC-X08S000 - interface card 8x SFP+ / 4x SFP28 for S620
description: Huawei HSIC-X08S000 interface card provides eight GE/10GE SFP+ optical ports for data access and line-rate switching by default. You can run the port combination-mode card command to change the port mode. After this command is configured, the first 4 ports are 10GE/25GE ports and the last 4 ports become unavailable The card is intended for switch S620-24T16X8Y2CZ
